title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
originalTitle: Portrait de la jeune fille en feu
posterAlt: Portrait of a Lady on Fire (2019) movie poster
tmdbOverview: On an isolated island in Brittany at the end of the eighteenth century, a female painter is obliged to paint a wedding portrait of a young woman.
synopsis: Portrait of a Lady on Fire (2019) is a drama and romance film from France. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.0 on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2010s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
